title: Performance Marketing Manager (w/m/d) - Befristet für 13 Monate
required_skills: Paid Social campaign management experience (D2C, App-Growth, or agency context)
Meta and TikTok campaign execution (Paid Social primary channel)
Analytical mindset: pattern recognition in data, CPA-driven decision making
Creative briefing and agency/in-house designer coordination
bonus_skills: Storytelling and sales psychology beyond trends
Knowledge of legal/brand guardrails in campaign execution
matched_skills: Analytical mindset and data-driven optimisation (IPC: ROI tracking, GRG: performance monitoring)
Campaign performance analysis (IPC: 4 B2B campaigns with KPI measurement)
Cross-functional coordination with design and external partners (IPC, Moli Media)
Structured performance reporting (HSBC, GRG, Moli Media)
missing_skills: Paid Social hands-on execution — HARD GAP (Meta Ads Manager / TikTok Ads direct management)
D2C / App-Growth / agency paid social context — HARD GAP (Boru's experience is B2B analytics)
German Arbeitssprache — B1+ may be insufficient for Munich-based German email provider
core_responsibilities: Plan, manage and optimise Paid Social campaigns (Meta, TikTok, other Social-First channels)
Manage campaign setups along full funnel with in-house designers and external agencies
Analyse performance data, interpret KPIs, derive optimisation actions
Develop scalable performance frameworks from systematic learnings and best practices
culture_keywords: United Internet (GMX, WEB.DE, mail.com — German email/digital services)

company_info.size_raw: United Internet / GMX, WEB.DE, mail.com — German digital services group
